name: How long do I have to file a workers comp claim for work-related breathing problems from dust in Boise?
description: File promptly from last exposure/diagnosis; typically 1-3 years in Utah, notify employer now.[1]

mainEntity.name: How long do I have to file a workers comp claim for work-related breathing problems from dust in Boise?

acceptedAnswer.text: File promptly from last exposure/diagnosis; typically 1-3 years in Utah, notify employer now.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Utah requires filing occupational disease claims promptly, with statutes analyzed based on last injurious exposure date.[1] Deadlines vary but generally 1-3 years from diagnosis or discovery, favoring broad coverage.[1] Key factors: (1) Presumption if on premises/clock; (2) Multiple exposures need careful timing; (3) Sue third parties within 4 years for negligence.[1] Notify employer immediately, document medically, file with Labor Commission; get legal review to avoid bars.[1] Missing deadlines forfeits benefits.
